name: ljg-roundtable
description: Structured roundtable discussion with truth-seeking moderator and dialectical debate

metadata.description: A Claude Code Skill that orchestrates structured roundtable discussions. A truth-seeking moderator invites 3-5 representative historical/contemporary figures to debate any topic through multiple rounds of dialectical exchange, generating ASCII framework diagrams and knowledge networks.

plugins.name: ljg-roundtable
plugins.description: Use /ljg-roundtable <topic> to launch a structured roundtable discussion on any topic
